speaker: speaker2
text: Could you cancel a check for me ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I wrote the check out for way too much .

speaker: speaker2
text: I wrote the check out for $ 150 .

speaker: speaker1
text: What were you supposed to write it out for ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I was supposed to write the check out for $ 100 .

speaker: speaker1
text: I ’ ll just cancel it for you right now .

speaker: speaker2
text: That ’ s great . You ’ re a lifesaver .
